meta.title: About Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko | Orthopedic Specialist, Shoulder & Knee Surgeon
meta.description: Meet Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko — orthopedic specialist and shoulder & knee surgeon with 37 years of experience. Conservative-first treatment philosophy, arthroscopic surgery, and Maccabi clinics in Rehovot, Bnei Ayish and Rishon LeZion.

meta.title: Licenses & Certificates to Practice Medicine in Israel
meta.description: The official documents authorizing Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko to practice medicine in Israel: the Ministry of Health license, the specialist certificate in orthopedic surgery, recognition of the medical degree and recognition of professional seniority.

documents.title: Four official documents, full transparency
documents.subtitle: Click any document to view it full size. The national ID number has been redacted to protect privacy.
